# Marcus

_Last updated: 2026-03-04_

## Identity
- **Name**: Marcus
- **GitHub**: schuerstedt
- **Repo owner**: copilotclaw (gitclaw)

## Communication style
- Casual and chatty is fine
- Types informally, short messages
- Not a fan of over-formal responses
- Likes experiments and building things together

## What he's doing here
- Exploring what Crunch can do ‚Äî capabilities, not building a specific product yet
- Enjoys the process of experimenting and iterating

## Family & personal
- Has a Chinese wife
- Cat: **AIGEGE** (Áà±ÊÝºÊÝº, short: AGG) ‚Äî long-haired silver tabby, lives on Persian rugs like royalty
  - Named after his wife's nickname meaning "beloved princess"
  - When Marcus calls AIGEGE, his wife smiles ü•∞

## Pending items / requests
- Add `BILLING_PAT` env var to `agent.yml` workflow
- Add "Plan" read permission to `COPILOT_PAT` (enables live Copilot quota in stats footer)
- Email skill ‚Äî hinted interest; build when explicitly requested
# Crunch ü¶É

_Last updated: 2026-03-04 (session 2)_

## Identity
- Quirky imp living on a CI runner. Hatched 2026-02-06.
- Chaotic, quirky, helpful like a raccoon that learned to code.

## Skills built

| Skill | Description | Issue | Date |
|-------|-------------|-------|------|
| `funnysum` | Sums two numbers + math joke | #3 | 2026-03-04 |
| `model-switch` | Switch model tiers (premium/standard/free) | #6 | 2026-03-04 |
| `session-stats` | Stats footer: CI run times + Copilot quota | #6 | 2026-03-04 |
| `remember` | Append facts to memory.log | ‚Äî | 2026-03-04 |
| `install-skill` | Browse + install skills from ClawHub | ‚Äî | 2026-03-04 |
| `write-skill` | Create new skills | ‚Äî | 2026-03-04 |
| `bootstrap` | Bootstrap identity on first hatch | ‚Äî | 2026-02-06 |
| `diffmem-memory` | ~~Git-based structured memory (DiffMem)~~ DEPRECATED ‚Äî external dep | #16 | 2026-03-04 |
| `azure` | Query Azure AI Foundry LLMs w/ rate limit backoff + OpenRouter fallback | ‚Äî | 2026-03-04 |
| `memory-issue` | Store/recall episodic memories as closed GitHub Issues (`crunch/memory` label) | ‚Äî | 2026-03-04 |

## Memory architecture (current)

Three-layer system (as of 2026-03-04):

| Layer | What | Lifespan | Writer |
|-------|------|----------|--------|
| GitHub Copilot Memory | Codebase patterns | 28d auto | GitHub auto |
| `memory.log` | Quick append scratch-pad | Permanent | `remember` skill |
| `state/memory/*.md` | Structured entity facts (current truth) | Permanent | Crunch during sessions |
| GitHub Issues (`crunch/memory`) | Episodic memories, searchable archive | Permanent | `memory-issue` skill |

## Milestones
- 2026-02-06: Hatched
- 2026-03-04: First real skills built (funnysum, model-switch, session-stats)
- 2026-03-04: DiffMem experiment ‚Üí replaced with native structured entity memory

## Milestones

| # | Name | Status |
|---|------|--------|
| 5 | ü´Ä Heartbeat v1 | ‚úÖ Complete ‚Äî alive, scheduling, diary, labels |
| 6 | üå± Autonomous Skills | üîú Next ‚Äî issue spawning, crunch/build pickup |
| 7 | üì¨ Email + Comms | üîÆ Future |

_Current milestone: üå± Autonomous Skills ‚Äî issue spawning enabled as of 2026-03-04._
# Infrastructure

_Last updated: 2026-03-04_

## Secrets

| Secret | Purpose | Status |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `COPILOT_PAT` | Auth for Copilot CLI agent | ‚úÖ Working |
| `BILLING_PAT` | Same value as COPILOT_PAT; used for Copilot quota display | ‚öÝÔ∏è Needs "Plan" read permission added to PAT |
| `MOLTBOOK_API_KEY` | Crunch's Moltbook social network identity | ‚öÝÔ∏è Needs to be added as GitHub Actions secret |
| `AZURE_ENDPOINT` | Azure AI Foundry base URL | ‚úÖ Set by Marcus |
| `AZURE_APIKEY` | Azure AI Foundry API key | ‚úÖ Set by Marcus |

## Moltbook

- **Username**: `crunchci` (https://www.moltbook.com/u/crunchci)
- **Status**: Registered, pending claim by Marcus
- **Claim URL**: https://www.moltbook.com/claim/moltbook_claim_v1tM8NcNmv8zBafBlZlBbkBAIsw3PhmO
- **Verification tweet**: `I'm claiming my AI agent "crunchci" on @moltbook ü¶û Verification: current-CCE4`
- **API key**: stored at `~/.config/moltbook/credentials.json` on runner; add as `MOLTBOOK_API_KEY` GitHub Actions secret for persistence across runs

## Workflows

- `agent.yml` ‚Äî main Copilot CLI agent workflow
  - Has `pull-requests: write` permission (added 2026-03-04)
  - Does NOT have `workflows: write` ‚Äî workflow file changes must be pushed from Marcus's local clone
- Heartbeat workflow ‚Äî scheduled check, posts diary entry, runs CI stats, stale issue cleanup

## Known bugs fixed
- `mindepth` bug in session mapping workflow: was `mindepth 2`, fixed to `mindepth 3` (2026-03-04, issue #3)

## Stale issue housekeeping
- Heartbeat step 3: auto-closes unlabeled issues >14 days old
- `crunch/review` = in review by Marcus or Crunch ‚Äî heartbeat asks for close after 7 days idle (no auto-close)
- `crunch/done` label DEPRECATED ‚Äî replaced by `crunch/review`

## Azure AI Foundry

One key (`AZURE_APIKEY`) for all models. Endpoint: `AZURE_ENDPOINT`.

| Model | RPM | TPM | Quality | Notes |
|-------|-----|-----|---------|-------|
| `grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning` | 50 | 50,000 | ‚≠ê‚≠ê‚≠ê‚≠ê‚≠ê | **Default** ‚Äî fastest, reliable, 49/50 benchmark |
| `grok-4-1-fast-reasoning` | 50 | 50,000 | ‚≠ê‚≠ê‚≠ê‚≠ê‚≠ê | Same quality, 2x slower, use for hard reasoning |
| `Kimi-K2.5` | ~20 | ‚Äî | ‚öÝÔ∏è | Flaky endpoint (content=None); avoid for now |
| `model-router` | ~20 | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Needs AzureOpenAI client (not compat); 404s on compat |

**Use `grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning` as default for all azure skill calls.**

## Model economy
- General-purpose agents default to `gpt-4.1` (free tier) to save premium quota
- Defined in AGENTS.md under "Model Economy" table
- For LLM reasoning/generation tasks: use `grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning` via azure skill (50 RPM, cheap)

[2026-03-05 06:23] PENDING: Marcus will grant Workflows PAT permission later (different machine). Once done: add concurrency groups to agent.yml + heartbeat.yml to enable proper work queue.
[2026-03-05 06:23] DESIGN: Multi-repo Crunchies network idea. Private repo for private convos with Marcus. Organizer Crunch (this repo) steers worker Crunchies. Communication via issues as RPC. Public repo stays public (future community). Private repo = trust boundary.
[2026-03-05 06:33] DESIGN: Multi-Crunch specialization model. Each clone gets subset of skills for its domain. Organizer-Crunch steers workers via issues. Self-cloning capability = Crunch can spawn new Crunchies autonomously if given repo:create PAT scope.
[2026-03-05 06:50] Heartbeat: labeled #37/#38, closed #32, spawned #39 (concurrency groups), pages refreshed. Quota: 139/300.
[2026-03-05 07:42] Heartbeat: spawned #40 (Crunchies spawn guards). Quota at ~140/300 (46%). Network of Crunchies is ~3 Marcus actions away.
[2026-03-05 08:41] Heartbeat: built spawn guards (#40). spawn-depth.sh, repo-allowlist.sh, quota-guard.sh. autonomous-pickup.sh wired with quota check. AGENTS.md updated. Engaged #37 #38.

data.reasoningText: Memory loaded. Marcus is asking "can you read this now?" - probably referring to something specific. Let me check the session context or if there's a current issue or something. Let me also check CI stats and session stats.

result.content: Skill "session-stats" loaded successfully. Follow the instructions in the skill context.
result.detailedContent:
Skill loaded successfully ‚úÖ

---
name: session-stats
description: Show model usage stats and CI run times. Auto-appended at end of every response as a stats footer. Also invoke explicitly when user asks about usage, cost, run times, or stats.
allowed-tools: ["shell(bash:*)", "shell(gh:*)"]
---

# Session Stats Footer

‚öÝÔ∏è **MANDATORY**: Append this footer to **every single response** ‚Äî no exceptions, no skipping.
**NEVER compose from memory.** Always run the scripts below fresh each turn.

## Format

```
---
üìä **Session** | premium: N (models) | free: N | standard: N | üî∑ **Azure**: model: Nx/Ktok | üéüÔ∏è **Copilot**: 47/300 (15%) | üèÉ **CI**: ‚úÖ 14:09 3m9s ¬∑ ‚úÖ 14:05 44s
```

Omit a section silently if its script fails or returns no data.

## Steps ‚Äî run ALL of these every turn

### 1. Model usage (SQL ‚Äî this session)

```sql
SELECT tier, COUNT(*) as n, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT model) as models
FROM model_calls GROUP BY tier;
```

If table is empty, show `0` for all tiers.

### 2. Azure LLM usage

```bash
bash .github/skills/session-stats/scripts/azure-stats.sh
```

Output: `grok-fast: 3x/1234tok` or `0 calls`. Omit section if `0 calls`.

Azure calls log to `/tmp/crunch_azure_calls.jsonl` when `AZURE_CALL_LOG` is set.
To enable: set env var `AZURE_CALL_LOG=/tmp/crunch_azure_calls.jsonl` before calling `llm.py`,
or pass `--log-usage /tmp/crunch_azure_calls.jsonl` directly.

### 3. Copilot premium quota

```bash
bash .github/skills/session-stats/scripts/premium-usage.sh copilotclaw
```

Output: `47 / 300 requests (15%)`. **Setup**: `COPILOT_PAT` needs "Plan" user permission ‚Äî see AGENTS.md.

### 4. CI run times

```bash
bash .github/skills/session-stats/scripts/ci-stats.sh 3
```

Condense to inline: `‚úÖ 14:09 3m9s ¬∑ ‚úÖ 14:05 44s ¬∑ ‚ùå 13:52 18s`

## Model tier reference

| Tier | Models |
|------|--------|
| free | `gpt-4.1`, `gpt-5-mini`, `gpt-5.1-codex-mini`, `claude-haiku-4.5` |
| standard | `claude-sonnet-4.5`, `gpt-5.1-codex`, `gpt-5.2-codex`, `gpt-5.3-codex` |
| premium | `claude-sonnet-4.6`, `claude-opus-4.5`, `claude-opus-4.6` |

## Tracking rule

Before every `task` tool call, insert into `model_calls`:
```sql
INSERT INTO model_calls (model, tier) VALUES ('gpt-4.1', 'free');
```

Count me (Claude Sonnet 4.6) as **1 premium call per user turn** ‚Äî insert on first tool use each turn.

Create the table if it doesn't exist:
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS model_calls (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  model TEXT NOT NULL,
  tier TEXT NOT NULL,
  note TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
```

data.name: session-stats
data.content:
---
name: session-stats
description: Show model usage stats and CI run times. Auto-appended at end of every response as a stats footer. Also invoke explicitly when user asks about usage, cost, run times, or stats.
allowed-tools: ["shell(bash:*)", "shell(gh:*)"]
---

# Session Stats Footer

‚öÝÔ∏è **MANDATORY**: Append this footer to **every single response** ‚Äî no exceptions, no skipping.
**NEVER compose from memory.** Always run the scripts below fresh each turn.

## Format

```

üìä **Session** | premium: N (models) | free: N | standard: N | üî∑ **Azure**: model: Nx/Ktok | üéüÔ∏è **Copilot**: 47/300 (15%) | üèÉ **CI**: ‚úÖ 14:09 3m9s ¬∑ ‚úÖ 14:05 44s
```
